case_title: AMIN H JAMALY VS. MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,055.06 FILED BY JAMALY, AMIN H AS TO DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON (SC-150) REQUEST TO POSTPONE ATTACHED FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-16-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED OCT-05-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY JAMALY, AMIN H MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMALY, AMIN H IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY & MERCEDES DEALER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF JAMALY, AMIN H ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. 506. PLAINTIFF AMIN H. JAMALY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MERCEDES COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TROY DAVIS, SERVICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT MERCEDES DEALER IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MELISSA DAWSON, AFTER SALES OPERATIONS MANAGER . BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE THEIR RIGHT FOR SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
